title: Embroidery Threads 50 Skeins Per Pack Embroidery Floss,Cross Stitch Threads，Friendship Bracelets Floss，Crafts Floss Rainbow Color with Free Embroidery Needles,Floss Bobbins
features: 【Vibrant Colors】Approx. 50 bright colors per pack, Each embroidery thread is about 8m per skein and composed of 6 strands ,pretty and brilliant rainbow colors as shown in the pictures. Blues, greens, reds, orange, pink, yellow, greys, blacks etc
【Material】 Embroidery thread is made of polyester fibers, soft, smooth, durable, long storage time, can be used for a long time, won't floss pilling and or falling apart

【Free Extra Collocation】10 Pcs Floss Bobbins,10 pcs golden eye needles，1 floss threader and 1 untwist tool -Use them when doing cross stitch, needlecraft, embroidery, diy craft, or other sewing work-to make all things easy and convenient!
【Perfect To Make Diy Crafts】 Can be used for making friendship bracelets, children's crafts, cross stitch projects, tassels, or any holiday decorations. Just enjoy happy time with whom you love most

【Size】Each Floss is about 8.75 yards long. And each embroidery thread consists of six strands, and each strand is formed by two thinner thread intertwined. This structure makes the embroidery thread more firm and not easy to break.
description: Product Description Perfect for cross-stitch, embroidery, needlepoint, smocking, and a wide variety of embroideries. Our Embroidery Floss is the most recommended thread in the world. Specification: Material: polyester cotton Specifications: 8 meters, 1 branch, 6 shares，which allows you to adjust the thickness of your stitching. 100% colorfast and fade resistant. Gram weight: 2.3-2.4 g / support Color:50 colors Package Includes 50 X Skeins Embroidery Threads 10 X Golden Eye Embroidery Needles 10 X Floss Bobbins 1 X Threader 1 X Untwist tool 50 Pack of Unique Embroidery Floss Project Ideas to Challenge your Creativity The unique Embroidery Floss - get creative in no time with these rainbow bright colors - great for any crafty projects, hand embroidery, embroidery for beginners, punch embroidery, cross stitch work, friendship bracelets, any decorations and many more.
